name: Array.LinearDirection

values.name: at
values.comment:
`Just` the element at an index in a direction.

    Array.at 0 LastToFirst
        (Array.fromList [ "lose", "win", "lose" ])
    --> Just "lose"


    Array.at 0 FirstToLast
        (Array.fromList [ "lose", "win", "lose" ])
    --> Just "lose"

`Nothing`, if the index is out of range.

    Array.at -1 FirstToLast (Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ])
    --> Nothing

    Array.at 100 FirstToLast (Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ])
    --> Nothing
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> Array.Array a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: concat
values.comment:
Append multiple `Array`s in a direction.

    Array.concat FirstToLast
        [ Array.fromList [ 2, 4, 6 ]
        , Array.fromList [ 8 ]
        , Array.fromList [ 10, 12, 14 ]
        ]
    --> Array.fromList
    -->     [ 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14 ]

    Array.concat LastToFirst
        [ Array.fromList [ 2, 4, 6 ]
        , Array.fromList [ 8 ]
        , Array.fromList [ 10, 12, 14 ]
        ]
    --> Array.fromList
    -->     [ 14, 12, 10, 8, 6, 4, 2 ]

values.name: drop
values.comment:
After a certain number of elements from one side.

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 ]
        |> Array.drop 2 LastToFirst
    --> Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ]

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]
        |> Array.drop 100 FirstToLast
    --> Array.empty

Nothing is dropped if the index is negative.

    Array.drop -1 FirstToLast
        (Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ])
    --> Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> Array.Array a -> Array.Array a

values.name: fold
values.comment:
Reduce an `Array` in a direction.

    Array.fold FirstToLast (++) ""
        (Array.fromList [ "l", "i", "v", "e" ])
    --> "live"

    Array.fold LastToFirst (++) ""
        (Array.fromList [ "l", "i", "v", "e" ])
    --> "evil"
values.type: LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> (element -> result -> result) -> result -> Array.Array element -> result

values.name: group
values.comment:
Split the `Array` into equal-sized chunks. The elements left over on one side are in `less`.

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 ]
        |> Array.group 3 FirstToLast
    --> { groups =
    -->     [ [ 1, 2, 3 ], [ 4, 5, 6 ] ]
    -->         |> List.map Array.fromList
    -->         |> Array.fromList
    --> , less = Array.fromList [ 7 ]
    --> }

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 ]
        |> Array.group 3 LastToFirst
    --> { less = Array.fromList [ 1 ]
    --> , groups =
    -->     [ [ 2, 3, 4 ], [ 5, 6, 7 ] ]
    -->         |> List.map Array.fromList
    -->         |> Array.fromList
    --> }
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> Array.Array a -> { groups : Array.Array (Array.Array a), less : Array.Array a }

values.name: insertAt
values.comment:
Put an element in an `Array` at a given index in a direction.

    Array.fromList [ 'a', 'c', 'd' ]
        |> Array.insertAt 1 FirstToLast 'b'
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd' ]
    Array.fromList [ 'a', 'c', 'd' ]
        |> Array.insertAt 2 LastToFirst 'b'
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd' ]

If the index is out of bounds, nothing gets inserted.

    Array.fromList [ 'a', 'c', 'd' ]
        |> Array.insertAt -1 FirstToLast 'b'
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'c', 'd' ]

    Array.fromList [ 'a', 'c', 'd' ]
        |> Array.insertAt 10 FirstToLast 'b'
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'c', 'd' ]
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> a -> Array.Array a -> Array.Array a

values.name: order
values.comment:
Keep the order if `FirstToLast`, reverse if `LastToFirst`.

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]
        |> Array.order LastToFirst
    --> Array.fromList [ 3, 2, 1 ]

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]
        |> Array.order FirstToLast
    --> Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]

values.name: removeAt
values.comment:
Kick an element out of an `Array` at a given index in a direction.

    Array.fromList [ 'a', 'a', 'b' ]
        |> Array.removeAt 1 FirstToLast
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd' ]
    Array.fromList [ 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd' ]
        |> Array.removeAt 0 LastToFirst
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'b', 'c' ]

If the index is out of bounds, nothing is changed.

    Array.removeAt -1 FirstToLast
        (Array.fromList [ 'a', 'a', 'b' ])
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'a', 'b' ]

    Array.removeAt 100 FirstToLast
        (Array.fromList [ 'a', 'a', 'b' ])
    --> Array.fromList [ 'a', 'a', 'b' ]
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> Array.Array a -> Array.Array a

values.name: replaceAt
values.comment:
Set the element at an index in a direction.

    Array.fromList [ "I", "am", "ok" ]
        |> Array.replaceAt 2 FirstToLast "confusion"
    --> Array.fromList [ "I", "am", "confusion" ]

    Array.fromList [ "I", "am", "ok" ]
        |> Array.replaceAt 1 LastToFirst "feel"
    --> Array.fromList [ "I", "feel", "ok" ]

If the index is out of range, the array is unaltered.

    Array.fromList [ "I", "am", "ok" ]
        |> Array.replaceAt -1 FirstToLast "is"
    --> Array.fromList [ "I", "am", "ok" ]
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> element -> Array.Array element -> Array.Array element

values.name: take
values.comment:
A certain number of elements from one side.

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 ]
        |> Array.take 4 FirstToLast
        |> Array.take 2 LastToFirst
    --> Array.fromList [ 3, 4 ]

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]
        |> Array.take 100 FirstToLast
    --> Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]

    Array.fromList [ 1, 2, 3 ]
        |> Array.take -100 FirstToLast
    --> Array.empty
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> Array.Array a -> Array.Array a

name: LinearDirection

values.name: toFirstToLast
values.comment:
Translate an amount or index to one that is used `FirstToLast`.

    at index direction array =
        Array.get
            (index
                |> toFirstToLast direction
                    { length = Array.length array }
            )

values.name: fold
values.comment:
Reduce a `List` in a direction.

    List.fold FirstToLast (++) ""
        [ "l", "i", "v", "e" ]
    --> "live"

    List.fold LastToFirst (++) ""
        [ "l", "i", "v", "e" ]
    --> "evil"
values.type: LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> (element -> result -> result) -> result -> List.List element -> result

values.name: group
values.comment:
Split the `Array` into equal-sized chunks. The elements left over on one side are in `less`.

    [ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 ]
        |> List.group 3 FirstToLast
    --> { groups = [ [ 1, 2, 3 ], [ 4, 5, 6 ] ]
    --> , less = Array.fromList [ 7 ]
    --> }

    [ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 ]
        |> List.group 3 LastToFirst
    --> { less = [ 1 ]
    --> , groups = [ [ 2, 3, 4 ], [ 5, 6, 7 ] ]
    --> }
values.type: Basics.Int -> LinearDirection.LinearDirection -> List.List a -> { groups : List.List (List.List a), less : List.List a }

values.name: order
values.comment:
Keep the order if `FirstToLast`, reverse if `LastToFirst`.

    [ 1, 2, 3 ] |> List.order LastToFirst
    --> [ 3, 2, 1 ]

    [ 1, 2, 3 ] |> List.order FirstToLast
    --> [ 1, 2, 3 ]
